headline: Trump Bought the Software Stock Slump—and More Revelations From His Trades
summary: President Donald Trump has been busy in the stock market.  Trump disclosed purchases and sales of hundreds of millions of dollars worth of U.S. stocks in the first quarter, according to a disclosure released by the U.S. Office of Government Ethics.  Trump purchased between $1 million and $5 million worth of  ServiceNow Adobe Workday  on Feb. 10, the disclosure revealed.

content.title: Trump Bought the Software Stock Slump—and More Revelations From His Trades
content.summary: President Donald Trump has been busy in the stock market.  Trump disclosed purchases and sales of hundreds of millions of dollars worth of U.S. stocks in the first quarter, according to a disclosure released by the U.S. Office of Government Ethics.  Trump purchased between $1 million and $5 million worth of  ServiceNow Adobe Workday  on Feb. 10, the disclosure revealed.
